zh.Well Kent England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維爾
zh.Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可德瓦德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedicta De Shelving於大約1340年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親John Shelving42歲，母親Benedicta De Denne36歲。她於大約1369年與Edmund Haute在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1391年4月在英國素瑞享年52歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.Well Kent England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾維爾
zh-hans.Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可德瓦德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedicta De Shelving于大约1340年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲John Shelving42岁，母亲Benedicta De Denne36岁。她于大约1369年与Edmund Haute在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1391年4月在英国素瑞享年52岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Shelving
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form Irish   Shevlin  .

variants.name: Shevlin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Seibhleáin ‘descendant of Seibhleán’, a personal name possibly derived from a diminutive of siabhal ‘fast-moving’.

nameMeanings.name: Benedicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Benedicta De Shelving was born about 1340, in Kent, England, her father, John Shelving, was 42 and her mother, Benedicta De Denne, was 36. She married Edmund Haute about 1369, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in April 1391, in Surrey, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedicta De Shelving est née environ 1340, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Shelving, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Benedicta De Denne, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Haute environ 1369, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en avril 1391, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedicta De Shelving um 1340 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shelving 42 und ihre Mutter Benedicta De Denne 36. Sie hat um 1369 in Kent, England Edmund Haute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb im April 1391 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Surrey, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta De Shelving è nata il circa 1340 nel Kent, England, sua padre, John Shelving, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Benedicta De Denne, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Haute circa 1369, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel aprile 1391, nel Surrey, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Benedicta De Shelvingが約1340年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Shelvingは42歳，母Benedicta De Denneは36歳であった。約1369年にイギリスケントでEdmund Hauteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1391年4月にイギリススリーで52歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedicta De Shelving(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shelving(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedicta De Denne(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1369년 영국 켄트에서 Edmund Haute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 4월 영국 수리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta De Shelving nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelving, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta De Denne, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Haute aproximadamente 1369, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em abril de 1391, em Surrey, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedicta De Shelving родилась около 1340 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Shelving было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Benedicta De Denne, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Haute около 1369 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла апрель 1391 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedicta De Shelving nació aproximadamente 1340, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shelving, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Benedicta De Denne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Edmund Haute aproximadamente 1369, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en abril de 1391, en Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
